title: aeschynomene glabrescens var. glabrescens
intro: Aeschynomene glabrescens var. glabrescens, also known as Glabrescens Aeschynomene, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Aeschynomene glabrescens var. glabrescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and improve respiratory health. The plant is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as teas and tinctures.
